display_name: Role Domain Overlay Proving Ground Template Pack

planning_summary.project_goal: Prove that PackFactory can create a new template with both a personality overlay and a role/domain overlay selected explicitly, while keeping those layers distinct and optional.
planning_summary.new_template_rationale: This proving-ground template exists only to exercise the new role/domain-template overlay path end to end without mutating an existing product line. It is intentionally disposable and bounded.
planning_summary.initial_benchmark_intent: Prove that a newly created template can carry both overlay types, remain schema-valid, and still materialize a valid derived build-pack that inherits the selected defaults cleanly.

personality_template_selection.selection_reason: Use the existing business-partner personality overlay as the communication layer so the proving ground exercises real composition rather than a role/domain-only case.

role_domain_template_selection.selection_reason: Use the new startup-operator role/domain overlay as the framing layer so the proving ground exercises a clear tone-versus-framing split.

notes: This template is a bounded PackFactory control-plane proof artifact for overlay composition.
The template is intentionally generic so it validates the overlay system rather than a specific product line.
